contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert km to miles?
contentBlocks.html:
Kilometer (km) is the standard distance unit in the metric system, used by most countries. Mile (mi) is used in the US, UK, and a few other countries. The conversion factor is: 1 km = 0.621371 miles, or 1 mile = 1.60934 km.

Converting km to miles is essential for driving in the US or UK, understanding race distances (marathon: 42.195 km = 26.219 miles), interpreting speed limits, and comparing distances in international contexts.

Common distances: 5 km = 3.1 miles, 10 km = 6.2 miles, 100 km = 62.1 miles, 1,000 km = 621.4 miles.

All calculations run locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.

contentBlocks.title: How does km to miles conversion work?
contentBlocks.html:
The international mile is defined as exactly 1,609.344 meters. Therefore, 1 km = 1,000/1,609.344 = 0.621371 miles.

To convert km to miles, multiply by 0.621371. To convert miles to km, multiply by 1.60934.

Quick mental math: multiply km by 0.6 for a rough estimate. Or use the Fibonacci approximation: consecutive Fibonacci numbers approximate the km/miles ratio (8 km ≈ 5 miles).

contentBlocks.title: Practical tips
contentBlocks.html:
• Marathon: 42.195 km = 26.219 miles. Half marathon: 21.0975 km = 13.109 miles.
  • Speed: 100 km/h = 62.1 mph. 120 km/h = 74.6 mph.
  • 1 nautical mile = 1.852 km = 1.151 miles (used in aviation and maritime).
  • US highway speed limits: 65 mph = 105 km/h, 70 mph = 113 km/h.

items.question: How many km is 1 mile?
items.answer: 1 mile = 1.60934 km. A mile is about 61% longer than a kilometer.

items.question: How long is a marathon in miles?
items.answer: A marathon is 42.195 km = 26.219 miles. A half marathon is 21.0975 km = 13.109 miles.

items.question: What is the quick way to convert km to miles?
items.answer: Multiply by 0.6 for a rough estimate. For better accuracy, use the Fibonacci trick: 5 km ≈ 3 miles, 8 km ≈ 5 miles, 13 km ≈ 8 miles.

items.question: What are common speed limit conversions?
items.answer: 50 km/h = 31 mph, 80 km/h = 50 mph, 100 km/h = 62 mph, 120 km/h = 75 mph, 130 km/h = 81 mph.

items.question: Are calculations done locally?
items.answer: Yes. All calculations run in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
